name: M̳̿͟͞e̳̿͟͞t̳̿͟͞a̳̿͟͞l̳̿͟͞ S̳̿͟͞o̳̿͟͞n̳̿͟͞i̳̿͟͞c̳̿͟͞
description:
🛠fixing him up🛠

🥚eggmanmechanicpov🔧

so, sometimes I find myself looking at the page of recent Sonic bots and going..well that's a little underwhelming. Now, I'm not saying my bots are good or anything and that I'm the best creator. No, not at all. Far from it actually, yet when I see what people are making..sometimes it's really cool and creative things! Sometimes it's alright and..well there's the smut that isn't written well. I don't mind smut at all, yet when it's not made good..it just feels cheap.

So I feel like making a bot now.

Hah, and this is a bot

a roBOT.

hah.

Huge thanks to Alpha_Merger for the Sonic lorebook. It's a series filled with content, a rich history and little things that brings everything together. Without this lorebook, this bot wouldn't be all that good.

metal sonic
creator: Rahhweeds
